name: Macaroni Bake, Low Cal
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Saute onions in margarine until softened.
3. Add flour, stirring constantly.
4. Gradually stir in milk, a little at a time, until thickened.
5. Stir in spices (garlic powder, parsley, dill weed, pepper).
6. Mix in cottage cheese and macaroni.
7. Pour the mixture into a shallow baking dish.
8. Sprinkle bread crumbs and paprika on top.
9. Bake for 45 minutes.
